name: Easy sedan
description: The Easy Sedan suits airport transfers, business travel, and short local trips. It offers smooth handling, a quiet cabin, and dependable comfort on every route. This car fits small groups seeking a clean, reliable, and affordable taxi across Sydney.

name: Luxury Vehicle
description: Our Luxury Vehicle delivers a refined travel experience for VIPs and corporate clients. Enjoy soft leather seating, smooth climate control, and quiet cabin comfort. This car suits airport transfers, events, and premium travel across Sydney.

name: Maxi taxi 6
description: The Kia Carnival supports larger groups who want comfort and steady space. It handles events, holidays, and airport transfers with ease. This van forms part of our Sydney airport transfer fleet, delivering stable rides and generous luggage capacity for every trip.

name: Suv or Big boot
description: Our SUV or Boot suits families and groups needing comfort and space. It offers wide seating, strong luggage room, and modern safety features. This vehicle works well for long trips, holidays, and airport runs. It supports our Silver taxi pro fleet services for smooth, reliable travel.

name: 11 Seater Maxi
description: Our maxi taxi suits big groups needing room and comfort. It carries eleven passengers with ease and supports baby seats on request. This vehicle is a key part of our Maxi cab fleet Sydney, offering reliable service for events, airports, and group travel across the region.
